notes: No fiscal_kpis in this chunk (KPIs appear only on chunk_001); all candidates come from event text.

All 33 candidates are grounded in the 2025-11-06 8-K (accession 0001546417-25-000139): Q3 2025 earnings press release EX-99.1 announcing the turnaround strategy, dividend suspension, 2025 Restaurant Closures, FY/Q4 outlook, and brand-level comps/traffic/check tables. Every evidence_quote verified verbatim against the source content.
Skipped event 0001546417-25-000137 (8-K 2025-10-06, Item 7.01 Reg FD): content is SEC item headers only, no substantive text to ground a driver.
Skipped event 0001546417-25-000134 (8-K 2025-09-30, Item 5.02 officer departure/election/appointment): item header only — no role or detail visible, too vague to coin a name without inventing.

Boilerplate risk-factor mentions (consumer confidence, supplier concentration, employee availability, data breach, weather, debt covenants) skipped as vague; kept only specific risk items: the ongoing U.S. government shutdown (named as such in the text) and tariffs (task asks to mine tariffs; mapped to familiar form tariff_policy).
Brand-level comparable sales coined as separate drivers per ontology R9 (brand metric is its own driver, distinct from company-wide same_store_sales).
dividend_policy (state=suspended), restaurant_closures, debt_paydown, turnaround_strategy named as reusable cause classes; states (suspended/closed/announced) kept out of names per R7.
